allow: Bash(osascript -e 'do shell script "installer -pkg /tmp/basictex.pkg -target /" with administrator privileges')

Bash(osascript -e 'do shell script "export PATH=/Library/TeX/texbin:$PATH; tlmgr update --self && tlmgr install latexmk beamer pgf etoolbox ms translator xcolor fancyhdr titlesec enumitem parskip booktabs amscls amsmath caption 2>&1 | tail -30" with administrator privileges')
Bash(osascript -e 'do shell script "/Library/TeX/texbin/tlmgr install latexmk 2>&1 | tail -20" with administrator privileges')
Bash(osascript -e 'do shell script "cd /tmp && /Library/TeX/texbin/tlmgr update --self 2>&1 | tail -5 && /Library/TeX/texbin/tlmgr install latexmk 2>&1 | tail -10" with administrator privileges')
Bash(osascript -e 'do shell script "cd /tmp && /Library/TeX/texbin/tlmgr install enumitem titlesec parskip fancyhdr 2>&1 | tail -15" with administrator privileges')
Bash(osascript -e 'do shell script "cd /tmp && /Library/TeX/texbin/tlmgr install fullpage 2>&1 | tail -10" with administrator privileges')
Bash(osascript -e 'do shell script "cd /tmp && /Library/TeX/texbin/tlmgr search --global --file fullpage.sty 2>&1 | head -10" with administrator privileges')
Bash(osascript -e 'do shell script "cd /tmp && /Library/TeX/texbin/tlmgr install preprint 2>&1 | tail -5" with administrator privileges')
Bash(osascript -e 'do shell script "cd /tmp && /Library/TeX/texbin/tlmgr install mathpazo psnfss lastpage colortbl float array 2>&1 | tail -20" with administrator privileges')
